decoration: moderate — a few SVG blobs or grid lines
hero_layout: minimal — just name and title, lots of whitespace
hero_headline_scale: large — noticeably big, makes a statement
card_style: cards with colored left/top accent border
scroll_animation: minimal — subtle fade-up on sections (CSS only, short delay)
hover_effects: expressive — tilt, glow, border animations, underline slides
quirk: skills are shown as a visual tag cloud, not a list
